reviews.review_description: This app is truly different from other meditation apps! The combination of singing bowl healing and sound therapy is such a brilliant idea.“ The 3D surround sound makes it feel like you are enveloped in calming sound waves, gently releasing tension.

Just tried this app out. The idea is good, which is why I downloaded it, but I'm quite dissapointed. 
When entering the game the menu does not work entirely correct. Some of the options are really hard to select for some reason. When finally selected, the start button does not always activate on clicking. 
Then, if an environment starts up:
- oh god, the guiding voice. It sounds so unnatural. I really cannot relax with it.
- There is no option to mute the guiding voice
- the environments are quite polygonated and shapes are quite sharp. It really needs smoothing.
- I thought the sky environment was the best of them, until I got really distracted by the dragon moving forward with a kinda weird twisting sweep over and over again. 

I think the idea is really good and I know how much work it is to create an environment, but at this point it is not worth the amound of money currently asked. It should be 3 euro's at the most at this point which could increase with more development.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We’re sorry the experience didn’t meet your expectations and greatly appreciate your valuable suggestions.
	1.	Menu Interaction: We’ve noted the issues with selecting options and the start button. Our team is working on optimizing these for smoother interactions.
	2.	Guiding Voice: We’ll improve the voice to make it more natural and add a mute option in future updates.
	3.	Visual Quality: Models and smoothing will be optimized to provide a more comfortable visual experience.
	4.	Effects: The dragon’s animation will be redesigned for more natural movements.
	5.	Pricing Suggestions: Thank you for the suggestion. We’ll work on enhancing value and consider promotional activities.

Your support motivates us to improve! Future updates will focus on these enhancements, and we welcome any further ideas you’d like to share!
